panels.framing: splash establishing — wide of the dance studio, full-wall mirror along the left wall, polished honey-wood sprung floor, white-painted ballet barre along the right wall, Amaka mid-rehearsal in a dance pose center-floor, mid-afternoon natural light streaming through tall windows behind her, water bottle and gray towel on the floor near the barre
panels.pose: mid-dance high arabesque — one leg extended back at hip height, body angled forward, arms in classical fifth position above her head, head tilted in line with the back leg
panels.expression: focused, in flow, the calm of a dancer mid-piece
panels.wardrobe_state: black athletic crop top, black high-waist dance leggings, barefoot, gold ankle bracelet on the LEFT ankle, golden-brown box braids reaching mid-back tied back in a single low ponytail with a black band, a few amber-beaded accents at random braid tips
panels.props_in_frame: mirrored wall reflecting Amaka, ballet barre, water bottle, gray towel, sunlight beams through tall windows, dust particles drifting in the light

panels.framing: MCU on Amaka's face and shoulders, head turned slightly as if hearing something behind her — faint golden-amber glow at the base of frame suggesting orisha presence beginning to manifest, her dark eyes wide and slowly recognizing what's arriving
panels.pose: head turned to listen, body still in dance posture, one hand half-raised to her chest
panels.expression: wonder of recognition, eyebrows just lifted, full lips slightly parted
panels.mood: first contact — the spirit announces itself
panels.wardrobe_state: black crop top visible at base of frame, braids tied back, gold ankle bracelet not in frame
panels.props_in_frame: faint golden glow at base of frame, drifting dust particles

panels.framing: full body of Amaka in the studio — body becoming visibly stronger and more developed already, the orisha glow now traceable on her dark brown skin as warm gold-amber traceries flowing up her arms and across her sternum, dance crop top and leggings beginning to feel taut across a thicker frame, mirror behind reflecting her transforming silhouette
panels.pose: standing tall now, arms slightly out from her sides with palms open, head tilted up listening to the orisha
panels.expression: reverent recognition, full lips parted, eyes brightening with gold-amber light
panels.wardrobe_state: black crop top taut over fuller chest, black leggings taut over thicker quads, braids still tied back, gold ankle bracelet visible on left ankle
panels.props_in_frame: gold-amber traceries on skin, drifting golden particles, mirror reflection in BG, ballet barre

panels.framing: MCU on Amaka's face and chest — golden-amber orisha aura glowing from within her skin, eyes now visibly glowing soft gold, full lips parted in reverent acknowledgement, braids beginning to come loose from the ponytail, a few amber-beaded braid tips beginning to lift on the energy currents
panels.pose: head tilted upward, both hands lifted to her own sternum, the second-to-last finger of each hand touching her clavicle
panels.expression: reverent, eyes glowing gold, the recognition complete
panels.wardrobe_state: black crop top taut, braids partially loose from the ponytail, gold-amber glow on skin, gold ankle bracelet not in frame
panels.props_in_frame: golden particles around her, mirror reflection blurred in BG

panels.framing: full body of Amaka mid-studio — body at tier 5 with substantially developed muscle (defined shoulders, biceps, lats, abs, quads), heavy gold-amber orisha aura now filling the air around her, the black crop top and leggings visibly straining, braids fully released from the ponytail and lifting on the energy currents, golden glow at the braid tips, mirror reflection showing her transformed silhouette
panels.pose: powerful dance pose — wide low stance, arms extended out to the sides at shoulder height with palms open and facing up, head turned to one side, body filled with grounded power
panels.expression: empowered, beautiful, dark eyes glowing gold-amber, full lips with a faint regal smile
panels.mood: the body now matches the spirit
panels.wardrobe_state: black crop top straining over fuller chest, black leggings straining over heavily developed quads, braids loose and lifting with gold-amber glow at tips, gold ankle bracelet on left ankle
panels.props_in_frame: heavy gold-amber aura, drifting orisha particles, mirror reflection, sunlight beams

panels.framing: splash beat — full body of Amaka mid-materialization, the black dance wear dissolving into golden particles around her as the traditional Nigerian-inspired warrior wear materializes around her body — gold-trim crop top in deep ochre, deep ochre wrap skirt, gold arm bands forming around both upper arms, braids fully loose and flowing with gold-amber light at the tips. Heavy volumetric ancestral gold aura filling the studio.
panels.pose: arms wide and extended outward and slightly upward, palms open, body angled three-quarter to camera, head slightly back, the dance and the transformation merging in one pose
panels.expression: regal, transcendent, beautiful dark eyes glowing gold-amber, full lips with a small commanding smile
panels.mood: the warrior emerges from the dancer
panels.wardrobe_state: transitional — black dance wear dissolving in gold particles, new warrior wear materializing — gold-trim ochre crop top forming over chest, gold-trim ochre wrap skirt forming around waist, gold arm bands forming on both upper arms, braids loose with gold glow at tips, gold ankle bracelet visible on left ankle
panels.props_in_frame: heavy gold ancestral aura filling the studio, gold particles, mirror reflection, dance studio interior glowing warm

panels.framing: MCU on Amaka's face and upper chest — fully materialized gold-trim ochre warrior crop top now visible at base of frame, gold arm bands at the top of frame, full lips with a regal commanding expression, dark eyes glowing gold-amber, braids loose past shoulders with gold light at the tips, beautiful Nigerian features glamour-lit
panels.pose: head tilted up and slightly forward, chin lifted, one hand reaching up to her own braid as she feels the new form, the other open at her side
panels.expression: reverent commanding gratitude, eyes glowing gold, full lips parted slightly, regal beautiful
panels.mood: she is the vessel and the dancer both
panels.wardrobe_state: gold-trim ochre warrior crop top, gold arm bands visible, braids loose with gold light at tips
panels.props_in_frame: gold aura around her, golden particles, blurred warm-lit studio BG
panels.dialogue_caption: Through me. Through this body you gave me.

panels.framing: full body of tier-7 Amaka — body at tier-7 reinforcement scale (massively developed muscle across shoulders, arms, chest, lats, abs, quads, glutes — per the tier-7 reinforcement ref), now in the fully materialized warrior wear with gold trim and arm bands, braids loose and flowing with bright gold light at tips, heavy gold orisha aura filling the studio, mirror reflection showing her commanding silhouette
panels.pose: warrior stance — wide and grounded, one fist raised at shoulder height, the other open at her hip, body angled three-quarter to camera, head turned to camera
panels.expression: commanding, beautiful, dark eyes glowing intense gold, full lips in a confident regal smile
panels.mood: the dance is the strength is the prayer
panels.wardrobe_state: gold-trim ochre warrior crop top fitted across massive chest and shoulders, gold arm bands on both upper arms, gold-trim ochre wrap skirt across hips and quads, braids loose with bright gold glow at tips, gold ankle bracelet on left ankle
panels.props_in_frame: heavy gold ancestral aura, gold particles drifting, mirror reflection with her warrior silhouette

panels.framing: full body of tier-8 Amaka — body at tier-8 reinforcement scale (overwhelming muscular development per the tier-8 reinforcement ref AND oversized bust matching the lineup tier-8 figure), fully materialized warrior wear, braids loose with intense gold light at tips, heavy volumetric gold-amber aura, ground beneath her feet glowing faintly gold, the studio softened by warm orisha light
panels.pose: tall warrior stance, both fists clenched at her sides, head slightly raised with chin lifted, body angled three-quarter to camera with chest forward and shoulders back
panels.expression: regal, transcendent, dark eyes glowing intense gold, full lips with a faint smile of a young goddess
panels.mood: she is becoming the orisha she channels
panels.wardrobe_state: gold-trim ochre warrior crop top fitted across tier-8 chest and shoulders (oversized bust per the lineup tier-8 figure), gold arm bands on both upper arms, gold-trim ochre wrap skirt across tier-8 hips and quads, braids loose with intense gold glow, gold ankle bracelet visible
panels.props_in_frame: heavy gold aura, drifting orisha particles, glowing studio floor beneath her, mirror reflection showing her goddess form

panels.framing: HERO SPLASH — full body of tier-8 Amaka, hero pose center-studio, gold orisha aura billowing around her, ground beneath her glowing gold, braids flowing with intense gold light, body at tier-8 lineup scale in the warrior wear, mirror reflection behind showing her goddess form, mid-afternoon light beams through tall windows mixed with the gold aura
panels.pose: hero stance — body angled three-quarter to camera, one fist clenched and held forward at chest height, the other open and extended out to the side at shoulder height, head turned full to camera, chin lifted, chest forward
panels.expression: triumphant, transcendent, beautiful, dark eyes glowing intense gold, regal smile of a young goddess
panels.mood: I am the dance and the strength and the ready
panels.wardrobe_state: tier-8 warrior wear at full presence — gold-trim ochre crop top, gold arm bands on both upper arms, gold-trim ochre wrap skirt, braids loose with intense gold light at tips, gold ankle bracelet on left ankle, all coverage zones maintained
panels.props_in_frame: heavy gold aura, drifting orisha particles, glowing floor, mirror reflection, sunlight beams through windows
panels.dialogue_caption: I am the dance. I am the strength. I am ready.
